name: Family Wellness Bisman
description: Family Wellness Bisman is a place to play pickleball in Mandan, ND. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Mandan Tennis Center
description: Mandan Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Mandan, ND. There are 14 hard courts. 10 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons.
